name: czrecoil_frame_update_a3d_cmd_ui
description: CZRecoilFrame::OnUpdateA3DCmdUI enables and checks the A3D command UI when the active backend is A3D.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is accepted by the czrecoil_frame_audio_api_cmd_ui VC target.
Binary Ninja keeps the branchless SetCheck boolean as a dec/neg/sbb/inc idiom in HLIL; assembly comments identify it as activeBackend == 1.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation at 0x431ae0 validates Enable(TRUE), zSnd::GetActiveBackend, and SetCheck(activeBackend == 1).
The native smoke selects A3D, then verifies OnUpdateA3DCmdUI enables and checks the command UI.
